subcodes.first_line: O H before S! Upon thee be the glory of God, the Lord of all worlds. My Greater Branch hath come into Our presence, and We make mention of thee, having remembered thee again [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا حاء قبل سین علیک بهاء الله رب العالمین قد حضر غصنی الاکبر و ذکرک ذکرناک مره بعد
subcodes.subjects: @power of the Manifestation of God, @power of prayer, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @knowledge; recognition of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @martyrs and martyrdom
